description_long: This is a walled residential property featuring a single-story house with a gable roof, surrounded by a paved driveway and landscaped greenery. The house is centrally located within the lot, with a main entrance facing a tree-lined street and a driveway leading to a garage or carport. The property includes several outbuildings or auxiliary structures, and the grounds are adorned with rows of trees and shrubs along the perimeter. The main building has a combination of blue and tan roofing, and the exterior walls are light-colored, likely stucco or painted concrete. The overall layout is organized and symmetrical, with clear separation between the house, driveway, and garden areas.
description: A single-story house with a gable roof sits within a walled, landscaped lot featuring a driveway, garage, and tree-lined perimeter. The property is organized with auxiliary structures and a main entrance facing a street.
description_view_0: From this angle, the house and its outbuildings are visible within the walled lot, with the driveway and tree-lined street clearly seen on the right.
description_view_1: This front-facing view highlights the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical arrangement of trees and structures along the street.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the property are visible, showing the auxiliary buildings and the continuation of the driveway and landscaping.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the back of the house, the garden area, and the dense row of trees along the rear wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small steps, and a modest overhang, flanked by landscaping and a paved driveway.
